title: Elephant Toothpaste Explained
description: Dash explains elephant toothpaste: catalyzed decomposition of hydrogen peroxide (often iodide or yeast catalyst) producing oxygen that inflates dish soap foam. Popular in science museums and classrooms around the world. Emphasize adult supervision / safety for concentrated peroxide. Stick-figure Dash climbs, points, and panics-comedically at the rising foam column.
note: Publishing credentials unavailable — stopped after MP4 export
